content.rendered: A supplemental post to 101 Digital Marketing & Fundraising Best Practices for Nonprofits, these 50+ fundraising statistics  can guide your nonprofit in creating and maintaining a successful online fundraising strategy.

excerpt.rendered: 50+ online fundraising statistics about online fundraising strategy, online giving, monthly giving, website and email fundraising, and social media fundraising that can guide your nonprofit in creating and maintaining a successful online fundraising strategy.
